negative.dog leash: This is not good for a small dog the leash is heavier than her I recommend making a version that ha a lighter clasp a well a lighter material
negative.leash carry: The leash is way too short and coiled way too tight to be useful Attached it to my waist i'm 5'4) my dog couldn't move to my side because the leash were too tight and the loop were in the front causing me to literally walk over them when attempting to use this Gave this two star because I use the belt still but with different leash and to carry other thing Super useful if you're thrifty
